title: Cheaper Hanging Signs
description: Doubles the amount of hanging signs you get when crafting from 6 to 12!
body:
# Cheaper Hanging Signs
Doubles the amount of hanging signs you get when crafting from 6 to 12!

![Recipe(same for all wood types)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57ea85cbf9d47ba9db1d8c0cfcf6004b534faa6c.png)

The recipe is the same as in Vanilla Minecraft, it just returns more hanging signs.
Works for all wood types!
